title: Blue Skies Gravestones Compat
description: Enable compatibility between Blue Skies and any Gravestone like mod
body:
🌌 **Graveyard Harmony: Blue Skies & Gravestones Unite!** ⚰️✨

Dive into the whimsical world of Minecraft where the ethereal skies of Blue Skies meet the chilling depths of gravestone mods! 🌈💀 With this innovative mixin, your gameplay experiences a delightful twist as the realms intertwine, bringing forth seamless compatibility! 

**Key Features:**
- 🌟 **Enhanced Adventure:** Explore vibrant landscapes while uncovering hidden secrets in gravestones that just got a major upgrade!
- 🪦 **Unique Gravestone Interactions:** Retrieve your items from the afterlife with style and flair, thanks to new mechanics that enhance your gravestone experience!
- 💫 **Visual Magic:** Enjoy stunning visuals as the beautiful Blue Skies blend with the eerie ambiance of your favorite gravestone mods!
- 🎉 **Compatibility Galore:** No more clashes—everything works together in perfect harmony!

Join the adventure and watch your Minecraft experience skyrocket! 🚀🔮✨
